name: VIEMED HEALTHCARE, INC.
summary: PART I Company Overview Viemed Healthcare, Inc. (the "Company" or "Viemed"), through its subsidiaries, is a provider of home medical equipment ("HME") and post-acute healthcare services in the United States, with a focus on respiratory, chronic care, and womens health products and services. The Companys primary service offerings are focused on effective in-home treatment with clinical practitioners providing therapy and counseling to patients in their homes using cutting edge technology.
